headline: We dogfood UnClick on UnClick.
target: UnClick public and agent-facing product surfaces
nextAutomation: Nightly dogfood receipts refresh this board with live checks and scheduled XPass package proof.

statusLegend.passing: A live check or scheduled package sweep ran and returned a passing result.
statusLegend.failing: A live check or scheduled package sweep ran and returned a failing result.
statusLegend.blocked: The check could not run because an action is needed, such as a missing credential or scope gate.
statusLegend.pending: The check is planned, package-ready, or scaffolded, but scheduled proof is not available yet.

proofPolicy: Public dogfood receipts mark passing only when a live check or scheduled package sweep actually ran. Blocked and pending are honest product states, not failures to hide.

xpassIndex.name: TestPass
xpassIndex.label: Live trust gate
xpassIndex.automation: PR check, scheduled smoke, dogfood receipt, wake-router watched
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: High mention volume because it protects merges and cron trust.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Keep it as the default proof gate while the rest of XPass catches up.

xpassIndex.name: UXPass
xpassIndex.label: Live dogfood lane
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume when the dogfood receipt or runner needs attention.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Promote to scheduled proof once the credential path is consistently healthy.

xpassIndex.name: SecurityPass
xpassIndex.label: Scope-gated
xpassIndex.automation: Blocked public receipt until safe recurring proof exists
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Low mention volume by design because unsafe probes stay disabled.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a deny-by-default recurring runner proof before live security checks.

xpassIndex.name: SlopPass
xpassIndex.label: Package-ready quality gate
xpassIndex.automation: Package runner, verdict pack, dogfood tests, XPass routing
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume because historical QualityPass references now route here.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a recurring SlopPass public receipt before marking it live dogfood.

xpassIndex.name: SEOPass
xpassIndex.label: Package-ready
xpassIndex.automation: Package runner, crawler-policy checks, MCP parity, dogfood scoring
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume around metadata, robots, sitemap, and public page changes.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a recurring metadata receipt before marking it live dogfood.

xpassIndex.name: CopyPass
xpassIndex.label: Package-ready
xpassIndex.automation: Deterministic copy review, CopyRoom boundary, dogfood tests
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume for public wording, claims, docs, and source-copy risk.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a recurring CopyPass receipt with CopyRoom/source-copy proof.

xpassIndex.name: LegalPass
xpassIndex.label: Package-ready guidance
xpassIndex.automation: Legal guidance tools, pack schema, public proof boundaries
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume when public claims, policy language, or disclaimers change.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a recurring LegalPass receipt that stays guidance-only, not legal certification.

xpassIndex.name: CommonSensePass
xpassIndex.label: Worker sanity gate
xpassIndex.automation: False-DONE and proof sanity checks for worker claims and queues
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: High mention volume around claims, proof receipts, merge-ready language, and queue health.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Publish the recurring proof receipt for queue and worker-claim sanity.

xpassIndex.name: FlowPass
xpassIndex.label: Package-ready
xpassIndex.automation: Journey map checks and end-to-end flow fixtures
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume for onboarding, checkout, handoff, forms, and success states.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a recurring journey receipt with one public flow target.

xpassIndex.name: GEOPass
xpassIndex.label: Package-ready
xpassIndex.automation: AI answer-engine readiness scanner and metadata evidence
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume for llms.txt, schema, bots, and answer-engine readiness.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a recurring answer-engine readiness receipt.

xpassIndex.name: RotatePass
xpassIndex.label: Boundary guard
xpassIndex.automation: Credential lifecycle docs and redaction guard
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Low mention volume because live credential rotation stays behind explicit scope.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a safe local credential lifecycle receipt without touching real secrets.

xpassIndex.name: WakePass
xpassIndex.label: Wake and stale-work gate
xpassIndex.automation: Dispatch, stale ACK, heartbeat, and reclaim visibility
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: High mention volume when scheduled work stalls or needs a fresh owner.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Expose a public-safe stale-work receipt for dogfood runs.

xpassIndex.name: EnterprisePass
xpassIndex.label: Guidance report
xpassIndex.automation: Receipt guard and readiness report boundary
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Low mention volume while it remains a guidance layer, not certification.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add low-risk readiness checks without claiming compliance certification.

results.name: TestPass
results.summary: Scheduled TestPass completed with 17 checks and 0 failures.

results.name: UXPass
results.summary: Scheduled UXPass could not run because DOGFOOD_UXPASS_TOKEN, UXPASS_TOKEN, or CRON_SECRET is missing.
results.evidence: Set one workflow secret so the nightly dogfood workflow can create a fresh uxpass_runs row.
results.nextProof: Set one UXPass workflow secret, then rerun the dogfood report workflow.

results.name: SecurityPass
results.summary: SecurityPass is blocked until the recurring runner proof is ready.
results.evidence: SecurityPass remains scope-gated; the public dogfood receipt does not run security probes yet.
results.blockedReason: SecurityPass is intentionally deny-all/scope-gated until a safe recurring runner proof lands.
results.nextProof: Land a safe recurring SecurityPass runner receipt before marking this passing.

results.name: RotatePass
results.summary: Credential lifecycle boundaries are documented and guarded, but no live credential rotation runs in public dogfood.
results.evidence: RotatePass stays boundary-only until a safe local receipt can prove redaction and lifecycle behavior without touching real secrets.
results.nextProof: Add a safe local RotatePass receipt that proves lifecycle handling without exposing secrets.

results.name: WakePass
results.summary: Wake and stale-work visibility exists, but the public dogfood receipt has not run a public-safe stale-work check yet.
results.evidence: WakePass powers dispatch, stale ACK, heartbeat, and reclaim visibility; public status stays pending until a public-safe receipt exists.
results.nextProof: Add a public-safe WakePass receipt for stale scheduled work and reclaim visibility.

results.name: EnterprisePass
results.summary: Seed enterprise-readiness report is published; automated evidence checks are not live yet.
results.evidence: See /enterprise/latest.json for the readiness-report boundary and pending category map.
results.nextProof: Wire automated evidence checks before moving this beyond readiness guidance.

lastActionableFailure.title: UXPass needs attention
